content.inputFormat: First line of the input contains single integer **T** - the number of test   cases. **T** test cases follows. First line of each test case contains pair of   integers **n** and **d**. Next line of each test case contains   **n** integers - array **B**. Next line contains **n** integers -   array **P**.
content.outputFormat:
In **T** lines print **T** real numbers - the answers for the   corresponding test case. Please round all numbers to exactly 4 digits after   decimal point.

Constraint1 <= **T** <= 5

1 <= **n** <= 50000

1 <= **Bi, d** <= 10^9

0 <= **Pi,** <= 100
